title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Google's Co-scientist uses AI to accelerate medical research and drug discovery, automating hypothesis generation and validation. Robin is an agent system that uses consensus mechanisms to identify treatments for diseases including leukemia, antibiotic resistance, and vision loss.
